steps.name: Step 3 â€” BUG-REVT-05: change must not be "+0%" for every single metric
[BUG-REVT-05] Not all 3 change values should be "+0%" when real transaction data exists â€” this indicates a calculation bug
Step 4 â€” change format must match expected pattern N% or +N% or -N%
summary "Total Transactions" change="+100.0%" must match Â±N% pattern
summary "Successful" change="+100.0%" must match Â±N% pattern
summary "Failed" change="+0%" must match Â±N% pattern
Step 5 â€” "+0%" prefix is semantically wrong for a zero change
